# rivalDrop

> rivalDrop watches a small known set of competitors for a sales team or a direct-to-consumer brand and sends a four-minute morning brief, five days a week. One tier, $149 a month, three rivals. Built for teams whose buyers compare them against three named competitors, not fifty unknown ones.

## What we offer

- **The morning brief.** Email Monday through Friday, in the inbox by 7am local. Three or four bullets. Each one names a rival, a number, and a date. Designed to be the thing you skim before your 9am call or your team standup.
- **The watchlist dashboard.** A live web view of every captured signal on every rival you watch. Filter by rival, by signal type, by date.
- **A 15-minute setup call.** We agree on the three rivals and what you want to learn.
- **Sample brief, before you sign up.** A 12-page PDF with real rivals and real numbers.

## Who it is for

- Sales teams in mid-market and SMB B2B, especially account executives and sales leaders running renewals, ramps, and bake-offs.
- Founders selling against funded competitors who keep changing the goalposts.
- Small Shopify and direct-to-consumer brands in cottage, ultralight, outdoor, and apparel categories where the buyer chooses between three direct rivals.

## Who it is not for

- Anyone selling to a wide unknown universe of buyers with no short list of named rivals.
- Enterprise sales orgs that need battle cards integrated with Salesforce. Pick Crayon or Klue.
- Teams expecting daily personal calls and a dedicated analyst.

## How it works

1. 15-minute setup call. Tell us your three rivals and the moves that matter to your buyer.
2. We set up a watch on their public surfaces: pricing pages, careers pages, product pages, blog posts, ad libraries, leadership pages, and a small set of secondary sources.
3. About 80 percent of capture is automated. A human reviews the captured changes and decides what is worth surfacing.
4. The first brief lands within five business days. Briefs continue Monday through Friday after that.

## Pricing

- **rivalDrop, monthly:** $149 a month. Three rivals tracked. Morning brief Monday through Friday. Live dashboard. 15-minute setup. Cancel any time.
- **First-week guarantee:** if we cannot capture useful signal in week one, you do not pay for week two.

## Important pages

- [Home](https://rivaldrop.com/): the offer in plain language.
- [How it works](https://rivaldrop.com/services.html): the morning brief, the watchlist, the dashboard, what we do not do, and how to start.
- [rivalDrop for Shopify](https://rivaldrop.com/shopify.html): the use case for direct-to-consumer brands.
- [Alternatives](https://rivaldrop.com/alternatives.html): honest comparison vs Crayon, Klue, Kompyte, Owler, page-change tools, and DIY.
- [Sample brief](https://rivaldrop.com/RivalDrop_sample_report.pdf): 12 pages, real rivals, real numbers.
- [Onboard](https://rivaldrop.com/onboard.html): the 15-minute setup form.

## What we do not do

- We do not make competitive recommendations. We tell you what changed and what we think it might mean.
- We do not sell aggregated client watchlists as a market intelligence product.
- We do not replace your sales process. The brief makes a good one sharper.

## Contact

- Email: hello@rivaldrop.com
- Setup call: https://cal.com/home-media-h1099p/15min
- Service area: remote and global.

## About

- Owner: rivalDrop is part of Groundlayer LLC, a Missouri holding company.
- Tagline: Watch. Capture. Drop.
